title: hieracium murorum proles oblongum
intro: Hieracium murorum proles oblongum, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum proles oblongum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and injuries.
